name: Text to Speech
description: Add spoken prompts and answers with system voices or configurable cloud providers.

uiEntries.label: Text to Speech
uiEntries.description: Choose voices, providers, and offline audio tracks.
uiEntries.helpText: System voices play during review; configured cloud tracks can create portable audio.

uiEntries.label: Speech controls
uiEntries.description: Play configured prompt and answer speech during review.

authoringActions.label: Generate offline audio after adding knowledge
authoringActions.description: After saving, generate portable audio for the matching profile's configured cloud tracks. System and realtime voices play during review but do not create files.
